metadata.title: Seedance 2.0 API
metadata.description: Test and integrate Seedance 2.0 API for multimodal AI video generation with text, image, video, and audio references.

title: Seedance 2.0 API
description: Seedance 2.0 is a multimodal AI video model by ByteDance, optimized for fast and realistic video generation. It supports high-quality virtual human video creation with strong multi-shot consistency, enabling more lifelike and cinematic outputs across scenes.

With efficient generation speed, Seedance 2.0 typically averages around ~5 minutes per generation, while Seedance 2.0 Fast averages around ~4 minutes, making it a reliable choice for scalable content production.
pricingNote: USD estimates use $0.005/credit with the best annual plan.

labels.apiDocsDetailDescription: Open the full API documentation for endpoints, authentication, task polling, and payload details.
labels.apiInputDescription: Keep the payload predictable while still allowing rich multimodal control.
labels.selectedModelNote: The playground, request sample, request fields, and pricing on this page follow the selected model type.

featuresTitle: What Seedance 2.0 API adds to your video workflow
featuresDescription: The page follows the same API-first structure as the reference: test the model, understand the fields, then move into integration.

capabilities.title: Multimodal references
capabilities.description: Combine prompts with images, videos, and audio so the model can follow subject identity, motion, rhythm, and visual style.

capabilities.title: Multi-shot consistency
capabilities.description: Create short cinematic sequences with steadier characters, camera logic, and scene continuity across cuts.

capabilities.title: Reference-driven motion
capabilities.description: Use source clips to guide camera movement, action timing, transitions, and high-impact visual pacing.

capabilities.title: Audio-aware creation
capabilities.description: Upload audio references or enable generated audio for beat-matched clips, music videos, and synced storytelling.

quickStartTitle: From playground test to production request
quickStartDescription: A compact integration path for teams that want to validate output quality before wiring the API into an app.

workflows.title: 1. Prepare request
workflows.description: Choose Seedance 2.0 or Seedance 2.0 Fast, then add prompt text and any reference media your workflow needs.

workflows.title: 2. Submit generation
workflows.description: Call the API with your account key, model id, duration, resolution, aspect ratio, and media URLs.

workflows.title: 3. Poll and render
workflows.description: Track the task until it succeeds, then retrieve the generated video URL for your app, campaign, or pipeline.

useCasesTitle: What you can create with Seedance 2.0 API
useCasesDescription: Use the API when your product needs repeatable AI video output, not just a one-off playground result.
useCases: Social clips for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

communityShowcase.title: Successful Seedance 2.0 generations from the community
communityShowcase.description: Browse public Seedance 2.0 outputs that finished successfully, then open any case to inspect the prompt, settings, and result.

productionNotes.title: Account-gated execution
productionNotes.body: Users sign in, submit jobs, and consume credits through the existing SdanceAI generation flow.

productionNotes.title: Reference media handling
productionNotes.body: The studio supports uploaded reference media, direct URLs, previews, and form/API payload editing.

productionNotes.title: Scalable model choice
productionNotes.body: Switch between standard and fast Seedance 2.0 modes based on quality, cost, and latency needs.

faqs.question: What is Seedance 2.0 API best for?
faqs.answer: It is best for short, cinematic AI video generation where prompt control and reference media matter, including product videos, social clips, motion replication, and multi-shot storytelling.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Seedance 2.0 and Seedance 2.0 Fast?
faqs.answer: Seedance 2.0 focuses on higher-quality output and stronger creative control. Seedance 2.0 Fast is optimized for faster iteration and scalable batch workflows.

faqs.question: Can I use images, video, and audio in one request?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Seedance 2.0 workflow supports text plus mixed reference inputs, including images, video clips, and audio references.

faqs.question: Where can I test it before integrating?
faqs.answer: Use the playground on this page to test prompts, references, resolution, aspect ratio, duration, and API payload behavior before moving into production.

faqs.question: What new features does Seedance 2.0 API introduce?
faqs.answer: Seedance 2.0 introduces broader multimodal control with text, image, video, and audio references. It is designed for better motion guidance, stronger scene consistency, and more predictable cinematic output.

faqs.question: How is Seedance 2.0 API different from typical AI video generators?
faqs.answer: Many video generators rely mostly on prompt interpretation. Seedance 2.0 is more reference-driven, so it can use source media to guide camera motion, action timing, transitions, subject style, and pacing.

faqs.question: How many references can I upload in a Seedance 2.0 API project?
faqs.answer: The workflow supports up to 9 image references, up to 3 video references, and up to 3 audio references. Reference video and audio inputs should stay within the documented duration limits.

faqs.question: Does Seedance 2.0 API support voice guidance and lip-sync generation?
faqs.answer: The model workflow supports audio-aware generation. You can use audio references for rhythm and pacing, and enable generated audio where supported by the selected version and request settings.

faqs.question: What video length and duration options are available?
faqs.answer: Seedance 2.0 is built for short-form clips, commonly in the 4 to 15 second range. Duration, aspect ratio, and resolution should be selected together to match your target output format.

faqs.question: Can I use Seedance 2.0 API for commercial projects?
faqs.answer: This page is configured for commercial-use workflows. For production use, review your account plan, credit balance, model availability, and any applicable content policy requirements.

cta.title: Turn Seedance 2.0 into your video workflow
cta.description: Open the generator, test a prompt, then use the API docs when you are ready to wire Seedance 2.0 into production.
